ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breach_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breach report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the breach incident */,
  "content" TEXT /* Detailed content of the breach report */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the report (e.g., news article, official statement) */,
  "breach_date" TEXT /* Date the breach occurred */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "create_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Unique slug for the report URL */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry affected by the breach */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the severity level of the breach */,
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the impact level of the breach */,
  "breach_status" TEXT /* Status of the breach (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Individual or organization that reported the breach */,
  "response_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for handling the breach */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the breach was resolved */,
  "public_disclosure_date" TEXT /* Date the breach was publicly disclosed */,
  "breach_details_url" TEXT /* URL to more detailed information about the breach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breach_reports_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breach_reports_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breach_reports_impact_id FOREIGN KEY ("impact_id") REFERENCES impact_levels ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breach_reports_create_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("create_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Healthcare, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the industry (e.g., NAICS, SIC) */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Primary regulatory body overseeing the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_levels" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "threshold_value" INTEGER /* Numeric value to define the threshold for the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_levels" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact level */,
  "impact_name" TEXT /* Name of the impact level (e.g., Limited, Significant, Critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impact level */,
  "financial_impact" INTEGER /* Numeric value to estimate the financial impact of the breach */,
  "reputational_impact" INTEGER /* Numeric value to estimate the reputational impact of the breach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breach report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "is_admin_action" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the action was performed by an admin user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES breach_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the organization belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the organization is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP or postal code of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was established */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last security audit */,
  "breach_history_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the organization's breach history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_breach_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("breach_history_id") REFERENCES organization_breach_history ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breach_organizations" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breach report */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization involved in the breach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breach_organizations_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breach_organizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES breach_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Personal, Financial, Medical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "sensitivity_level" TEXT /* Sensitivity level of the data type (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breach_data_types" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breach report */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type compromised in the breach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breach_data_types_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breach_data_types_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES breach_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_breach_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breach history entry */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the organizations table */,
  "breach_count" INTEGER /* Number of breaches the organization has experienced */,
  "last_breach_date" TEXT /* Date of the last breach */,
  "average_breach_resolution_time" TEXT /* Average time taken to resolve breaches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident response */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the breach reports table */,
  "response_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the response teams table */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was initiated */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the response actions taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_responses_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES breach_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_responses_response_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_team_id") REFERENCES response_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the response team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table for the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
